tasks.label: license-mcp: install
tasks.command:
STATE_FILE="$HOME/.cache/license-mcp/installer-source"; CODEX_DIR="$HOME/.codex"; CODEX_CONFIG="$CODEX_DIR/config.toml"; mkdir -p "$(dirname "$STATE_FILE")"; if command -v pipx >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Using pipx"; pipx install --force . && printf "pipx
" > "$STATE_FILE"; elif command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "pipx not found, using uv"; uv tool install --force . && printf "uv
" > "$STATE_FILE"; else echo "Error: neither pipx nor uv is installed."; exit 1; fi; if [ -d "$CODEX_DIR" ]; then echo "Codex directory found: $CODEX_DIR"; printf "Install Codex MCP entry in %s? [y/N] " "$CODEX_CONFIG"; read -r INSTALL_CODEX; case "$INSTALL_CODEX" in y|Y|yes|YES) if [ -f "$CODEX_CONFIG" ] && grep -Fq "[mcp_servers.license_scan]" "$CODEX_CONFIG"; then echo "Codex MCP entry already present."; else mkdir -p "$CODEX_DIR"; if [ -f "$CODEX_CONFIG" ] && [ -s "$CODEX_CONFIG" ]; then printf "
" >> "$CODEX_CONFIG"; fi; printf "[mcp_servers.license_scan]
command = "license-mcp"
args = ["serve"]
" >> "$CODEX_CONFIG"; echo "Codex MCP entry added to $CODEX_CONFIG"; fi ;; *) echo "Skipping Codex MCP configuration." ;; esac; else echo "Codex directory not found ($CODEX_DIR). Skipping Codex MCP configuration."; fi

tasks.label: license-mcp: uninstall
tasks.command: STATE_FILE="$HOME/.cache/license-mcp/installer-source"; CODEX_DIR="$HOME/.codex"; CODEX_CONFIG="$CODEX_DIR/config.toml"; INSTALLER=""; if [ -f "$STATE_FILE" ]; then INSTALLER="$(tr -d ' \t\r\n' < "$STATE_FILE")"; fi; if [ "$INSTALLER" = "pipx" ]; then if ! command -v pipx >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Error: install was done with pipx, but pipx is not available."; exit 1; fi; pipx uninstall license-mcp-scanner && rm -f "$STATE_FILE"; elif [ "$INSTALLER" = "uv" ]; then if ! command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Error: install was done with uv, but uv is not available."; exit 1; fi; uv tool uninstall license-mcp-scanner && rm -f "$STATE_FILE"; else echo "No installer state found, trying available tools."; if command -v pipx >/dev/null 2>&1 && pipx uninstall license-mcp-scanner; then rm -f "$STATE_FILE"; elif command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 && uv tool uninstall license-mcp-scanner; then rm -f "$STATE_FILE"; else echo "Error: package not found or neither pipx nor uv is installed."; exit 1; fi; fi; if [ -d "$CODEX_DIR" ]; then echo "Codex directory found: $CODEX_DIR"; printf "Remove Codex MCP entry from %s? [y/N] " "$CODEX_CONFIG"; read -r UNINSTALL_CODEX; case "$UNINSTALL_CODEX" in y|Y|yes|YES) if [ -f "$CODEX_CONFIG" ] && grep -Fq "[mcp_servers.license_scan]" "$CODEX_CONFIG"; then TMP_FILE="$(mktemp)"; awk 'BEGIN{skip=0} /^\[mcp_servers\.license_scan\][[:space:]]*$/{skip=1; next} /^\[[^]]+\][[:space:]]*$/{if(skip){skip=0}} !skip{print}' "$CODEX_CONFIG" > "$TMP_FILE" && mv "$TMP_FILE" "$CODEX_CONFIG"; echo "Codex MCP entry removed from $CODEX_CONFIG"; else echo "Codex MCP entry not found in $CODEX_CONFIG"; fi ;; *) echo "Skipping Codex MCP cleanup." ;; esac; else echo "Codex directory not found ($CODEX_DIR). Skipping Codex MCP cleanup."; fi

tasks.label: license-mcp: clean cache
tasks.command: CACHE_DIR="$HOME/.cache/license-mcp"; SCANS_DIR="$CACHE_DIR/scans"; if [ -d "$SCANS_DIR" ]; then rm -rf "$SCANS_DIR" && echo "Removed: $SCANS_DIR"; else echo "Nothing to clean: $SCANS_DIR not found"; fi; mkdir -p "$SCANS_DIR"
